issues.detail: Does not explicitly handle file read errors or permission issues.
Uses a Claude-specific file path, limiting portability.

scenarios.name: Initial setup of product marketing context for a SaaS repo
scenarios.rationale: Baseline dumps a single block of questions and saves to an arbitrary file with no existence check or section structure; treatment first checks for the documented `.claude/product-marketing-context.md`, offers the auto-draft vs from-scratch options, drafts all 12 sections with [needs input] gap markers, and saves to the documented path.

scenarios.name: Update existing context after repositioning from freelancers to agencies
scenarios.rationale: Baseline rewrites the whole document without reading existing state; treatment reads `.claude/product-marketing-context.md` first, summarizes current state, walks through only the affected sections (Target Audience, Personas, Pain Points, Customer Language, Competitive Landscape) one at a time, and pushes for verbatim agency language.
